records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What on earth happened here a few hours ago?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What on earth happened here a few hours ago?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What on earth happened here a few hours ago?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like a dimensional storm passed by here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like a dimensional storm passed by here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like a dimensional storm passed by here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! How are you all going to take responsibility for what happened here?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! How are you all going to take responsibility for what happened here?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! How are you all going to take responsibility for what happened here?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The power room is destroyed, rendering all the elevators in Zone 4 inoperable!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The power room is destroyed, rendering all the elevators in Zone 4 inoperable!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The power room is destroyed, rendering all the elevators in Zone 4 inoperable!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chamber City Management is doing its best to clarify the situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chamber City Management is doing its best to clarify the situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chamber City Management is doing its best to clarify the situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down? Did you just tell me to calm down?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down? Did you just tell me to calm down?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down? Did you just tell me to calm down?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are a lift company that has an official partnership with Chamber City Management!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are a lift company that has an official partnership with Chamber City Management!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are a lift company that has an official partnership with Chamber City Management!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you telling me to believe that a single terrorist caused all this commotion?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you telling me to believe that a single terrorist caused all this commotion?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you telling me to believe that a single terrorist caused all this commotion?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you even know what percentage of our elevator revenue the Administration takes from us each year?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you even know what percentage of our elevator revenue the Administration takes from us each year?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you even know what percentage of our elevator revenue the Administration takes from us each year?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
As I said, the City Management is doing its best
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
As I said, the City Management is doing its best
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
As I said, the City Management is doing its best
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Response team, do you copy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Response team, do you copy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Response team, do you copy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We found a lead. Return to HQ immediately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We found a lead. Return to HQ immediately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We found a lead. Return to HQ immediately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Return to HQ when you found a lead?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Return to HQ when you found a lead?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Return to HQ when you found a lead?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A <color=#ffd34c>message</color> was found at the scene.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A <color=#ffd34c>message</color> was found at the scene.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A <color=#ffd34c>message</color> was found at the scene.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We believe it to be the method of an international terrorist group that the Administration has been pursuing for several years.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We believe it to be the method of an international terrorist group that the Administration has been pursuing for several years.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We believe it to be the method of an international terrorist group that the Administration has been pursuing for several years.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, the Administration's Counterterrorism Investigation team will take on the case from here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, the Administration's Counterterrorism Investigation team will take on the case from here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, the Administration's Counterterrorism Investigation team will take on the case from here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, the response team is ordered to return to HQ.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, the response team is ordered to return to HQ.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, the response team is ordered to return to HQ.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello? Yes, this is Skinner of the Canary Squad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello? Yes, this is Skinner of the Canary Squad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello? Yes, this is Skinner of the Canary Squad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me? Who is this again...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me? Who is this again...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me? Who is this again...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Please hold. I'll get him for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Please hold. I'll get him for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Please hold. I'll get him for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think you need to take this, Boss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think you need to take this, Boss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think you need to take this, Boss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It sounds like someone very important.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It sounds like someone very important.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It sounds like someone very important.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies for calling at such a late hour, Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies for calling at such a late hour, Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies for calling at such a late hour, Supreme Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, you must be the Senior of Charade?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, you must be the Senior of Charade?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, you must be the Senior of Charade?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. This is Richard Werner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. This is Richard Werner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. This is Richard Werner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard the news. It seems that your employees were involved in some unfortunate events in the Gauntlet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard the news. It seems that your employees were involved in some unfortunate events in the Gauntlet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the news. It seems that your employees were involved in some unfortunate events in the Gauntlet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Results over rules. It is the disease that has plagued Charade for decades, in return for its rapid development.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Results over rules. It is the disease that has plagued Charade for decades, in return for its rapid development.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Results over rules. It is the disease that has plagued Charade for decades, in return for its rapid development.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I must say, it was quite unexpected of you to hire grade 3 citizens.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I must say, it was quite unexpected of you to hire grade 3 citizens.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I must say, it was quite unexpected of you to hire grade 3 citizens.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Should you have been aiming for results in the Gauntlet, your other employees would have been more than sufficient.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Should you have been aiming for results in the Gauntlet, your other employees would have been more than sufficient.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Should you have been aiming for results in the Gauntlet, your other employees would have been more than sufficient.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I assume you don't plan on taking action for the malfeasance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I assume you don't plan on taking action for the malfeasance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I assume you don't plan on taking action for the malfeasance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm afraid not. Primarily because I respect the unwritten law of the ruling class...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm afraid not. Primarily because I respect the unwritten law of the ruling class...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm afraid not. Primarily because I respect the unwritten law of the ruling class...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But moreover, I consider this League to be a good opportunity for you to prove your abilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But moreover, I consider this League to be a good opportunity for you to prove your abilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But moreover, I consider this League to be a good opportunity for you to prove your abilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And why should I be proving something at all?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And why should I be proving something at all?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And why should I be proving something at all?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All these years, you have been taking care of everything in the dark. That's an undeniable fact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All these years, you have been taking care of everything in the dark. That's an undeniable fact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All these years, you have been taking care of everything in the dark. That's an undeniable fact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But instead of staying in the dark, you've decided to come forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But instead of staying in the dark, you've decided to come forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But instead of staying in the dark, you've decided to come forward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Controlling everything from behind the curtain and being a leader of the people are extremely different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Controlling everything from behind the curtain and being a leader of the people are extremely different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Controlling everything from behind the curtain and being a leader of the people are extremely different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So show us that you possess the ability to do so. Should you succeed, you will earn respect from all of us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So show us that you possess the ability to do so. Should you succeed, you will earn respect from all of us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So show us that you possess the ability to do so. Should you succeed, you will earn respect from all of us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will consider it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will consider it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will consider it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Supreme Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wish you good luck. Farewell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wish you good luck. Farewell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wish you good luck. Farewell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies for keeping you waiting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies for keeping you waiting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies for keeping you waiting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't stop you if you wish to stay quiet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't stop you if you wish to stay quiet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't stop you if you wish to stay quiet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But do remember that among the people you've killed, there are also my men from the Multinational Coalition Force.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But do remember that among the people you've killed, there are also my men from the Multinational Coalition Force.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But do remember that among the people you've killed, there are also my men from the Multinational Coalition Force.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no intention of sending you off to prison unharmed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no intention of sending you off to prison unharmed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no intention of sending you off to prison unharmed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let us continue the interrogation, terrorist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let us continue the interrogation, terrorist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let us continue the interrogation, terrorist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ke. Keke.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ke. Keke.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ke. Keke.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have to be kidding me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have to be kidding me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have to be kidding me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. So, she is actually Charade's secret agent...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. So, she is actually Charade's secret agent...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. So, she is actually Charade's secret agent...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And she infiltrated Six Wings years ago and has been feeding you with confidential information about us...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And she infiltrated Six Wings years ago and has been feeding you with confidential information about us...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And she infiltrated Six Wings years ago and has been feeding you with confidential information about us...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. It is an operation that has been in the works for years.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. It is an operation that has been in the works for years.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. It is an operation that has been in the works for years.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan gave us intel that Six Wings will appear at the end of the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan gave us intel that Six Wings will appear at the end of the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan gave us intel that Six Wings will appear at the end of the Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a result, we were able to capture you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a result, we were able to capture you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a result, we were able to capture you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keke...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keke...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keke...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This has got to be a joke.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This has got to be a joke.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This has got to be a joke.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, mister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, mister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, mister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really believe what you just told me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really believe what you just told me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really believe what you just told me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We knew from the beginning that she would be against us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We knew from the beginning that she would be against us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We knew from the beginning that she would be against us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But do you know why we didn't just get rid of her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But do you know why we didn't just get rid of her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But do you know why we didn't just get rid of her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because we thought that our interests aligned until the Qliphoth Game ended.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because we thought that our interests aligned until the Qliphoth Game ended.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because we thought that our interests aligned until the Qliphoth Game ended.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, you still don't get it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, you still don't get it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, you still don't get it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What she did in Six Wings was collecting information.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What she did in Six Wings was collecting information.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What she did in Six Wings was collecting information.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was the perfect role for her as she was the only one of us who could show her face out in public.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was the perfect role for her as she was the only one of us who could show her face out in public.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was the perfect role for her as she was the only one of us who could show her face out in public.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the same time, she was also in charge of concealing our members' whereabouts from being exposed to the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the same time, she was also in charge of concealing our members' whereabouts from being exposed to the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the same time, she was also in charge of concealing our members' whereabouts from being exposed to the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look, man.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look, man.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look, man.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said that you got information about us through that haughty woman, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said that you got information about us through that haughty woman, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said that you got information about us through that haughty woman, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But from our perspective, we knew all about the Administration's situation through her too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But from our perspective, we knew all about the Administration's situation through her too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But from our perspective, we knew all about the Administration's situation through her too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, what do you think that means?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, what do you think that means?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, what do you think that means?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Nonsense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Nonsense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Nonsense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Warden, increase the output of the mind jammer to the maximum.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Warden, increase the output of the mind jammer to the maximum.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Warden, increase the output of the mind jammer to the maximum.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Could you turn that noisy thing off?! My head is ringing like crazy!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Could you turn that noisy thing off?! My head is ringing like crazy!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Could you turn that noisy thing off?! My head is ringing like crazy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're trying to tear us apart, you'd better stop, terrorist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're trying to tear us apart, you'd better stop, terrorist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're trying to tear us apart, you'd better stop, terrorist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We all know that your ability is brainwashing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We all know that your ability is brainwashing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We all know that your ability is brainwashing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I already told you, I don't! When will you get that through your thick skull?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I already told you, I don't! When will you get that through your thick skull?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I already told you, I don't! When will you get that through your thick skull?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine! Whatever! But let me ask you one last question!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fine! Whatever! But let me ask you one last question!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine! Whatever! But let me ask you one last question!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The location where that woman and I met after the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The location where that woman and I met after the Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The location where that woman and I met after the Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anything is fine. Did she ever tell you about what that place is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anything is fine. Did she ever tell you about what that place is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anything is fine. Did she ever tell you about what that place is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Place...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Place...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Place...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I must ask.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I must ask.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I must ask.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Six Wings is a terrorist organization that the Administration has been after for years.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Six Wings is a terrorist organization that the Administration has been after for years.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Six Wings is a terrorist organization that the Administration has been after for years.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But how were you able to lure a member to a remote place this easily?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But how were you able to lure a member to a remote place this easily?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But how were you able to lure a member to a remote place this easily?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was the information that even Six Wings wanted so badly?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was the information that even Six Wings wanted so badly?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was the information that even Six Wings wanted so badly?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It seems you've forgotten, Richard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It seems you've forgotten, Richard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It seems you've forgotten, Richard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our deal was that I provide intelligence on Six Wings, and you cover up my activities behind the scenes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our deal was that I provide intelligence on Six Wings, and you cover up my activities behind the scenes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our deal was that I provide intelligence on Six Wings, and you cover up my activities behind the scenes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever secrets we have, didn't we agree not to ask each other about them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever secrets we have, didn't we agree not to ask each other about them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever secrets we have, didn't we agree not to ask each other about them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Forget it. It's obvious she didn't tell you a thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Forget it. It's obvious she didn't tell you a thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Forget it. It's obvious she didn't tell you a thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because it's also something she hid from us until the end too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because it's also something she hid from us until the end too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because it's also something she hid from us until the end too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, you're so slow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, you're so slow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, you're so slow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll tell you one last time, so listen up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll tell you one last time, so listen up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll tell you one last time, so listen up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are all being toyed with by her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are all being toyed with by her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are all being toyed with by her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You idiots.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You idiots.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You idiots.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mr. Richard. Chamber City Management is on the other line.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mr. Richard. Chamber City Management is on the other line.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mr. Richard. Chamber City Management is on the other line.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chamber? What is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chamber? What is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chamber? What is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're not certain, but it seems like a member of Six Wings' activities have been sighted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're not certain, but it seems like a member of Six Wings' activities have been sighted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're not certain, but it seems like a member of Six Wings' activities have been sighted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A cryptic message was left behind at the scene.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A cryptic message was left behind at the scene.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A cryptic message was left behind at the scene.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How unusual that you contact me first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How unusual that you contact me first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How unusual that you contact me first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what is so urgent you had to call at this late hour, doctor?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what is so urgent you had to call at this late hour, doctor?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what is so urgent you had to call at this late hour, doctor?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need a testbed for a test subject.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need a testbed for a test subject.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need a testbed for a test subject.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A testbed...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A testbed...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A testbed...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does that mean that the Northern Union's test of weaponizing C.O.s was a success...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does that mean that the Northern Union's test of weaponizing C.O.s was a success...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does that mean that the Northern Union's test of weaponizing C.O.s was a success...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although it still needs verification, I thought you might be interested.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although it still needs verification, I thought you might be interested.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although it still needs verification, I thought you might be interested.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since you are the one who secretly secured the fallen Jehuty's laboratories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since you are the one who secretly secured the fallen Jehuty's laboratories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since you are the one who secretly secured the fallen Jehuty's laboratories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let me see the product first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let me see the product first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let me see the product first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's called Harvester. He is a C.O. that understands human language and can learn.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's called Harvester. He is a C.O. that understands human language and can learn.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's called Harvester. He is a C.O. that understands human language and can learn.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Harvester...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Harvester...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Harvester...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A C.O. that can communicate with humans? How is that even possible?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A C.O. that can communicate with humans? How is that even possible?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A C.O. that can communicate with humans? How is that even possible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The rest is confidential, so I can't go into detail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The rest is confidential, so I can't go into detail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The rest is confidential, so I can't go into detail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our goal is to secure empirical data in a variety of situations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our goal is to secure empirical data in a variety of situations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our goal is to secure empirical data in a variety of situations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, the place we are in is extremely closed off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, the place we are in is extremely closed off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, the place we are in is extremely closed off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you are saying that you need data outside of the lab.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you are saying that you need data outside of the lab.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you are saying that you need data outside of the lab.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I decline, are you going to hand over the product to another company?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I decline, are you going to hand over the product to another company?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I decline, are you going to hand over the product to another company?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Securing data is more important than money for us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Securing data is more important than money for us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Securing data is more important than money for us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give me some time to think about it, doctor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give me some time to think about it, doctor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give me some time to think about it, doctor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if so, handling a C.O. is too risky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if so, handling a C.O. is too risky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if so, handling a C.O. is too risky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least...
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least...
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you at least have some safety measures procured, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you at least have some safety measures procured, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you at least have some safety measures procured, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What on earth happened here a few hours ago?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What on earth happened here a few hours ago?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What on earth happened here a few hours ago?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like a dimensional storm passed by here...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like a dimensional storm passed by here...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like a dimensional storm passed by here...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! How are you all going to take responsibility for what happened here?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! How are you all going to take responsibility for what happened here?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! How are you all going to take responsibility for what happened here?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The power room is destroyed, rendering all the elevators in Zone 4 inoperable!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The power room is destroyed, rendering all the elevators in Zone 4 inoperable!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The power room is destroyed, rendering all the elevators in Zone 4 inoperable!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Chamber City Management is doing its best to clarify the situation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Chamber City Management is doing its best to clarify the situation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Chamber City Management is doing its best to clarify the situation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down? Did you just tell me to calm down?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down? Did you just tell me to calm down?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down? Did you just tell me to calm down?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We are a lift company that has an official partnership with Chamber City Management!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We are a lift company that has an official partnership with Chamber City Management!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We are a lift company that has an official partnership with Chamber City Management!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you telling me to believe that a single terrorist caused all this commotion?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you telling me to believe that a single terrorist caused all this commotion?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you telling me to believe that a single terrorist caused all this commotion?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you even know what percentage of our elevator revenue the Administration takes from us each year?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you even know what percentage of our elevator revenue the Administration takes from us each year?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you even know what percentage of our elevator revenue the Administration takes from us each year?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
As I said, the City Management is doing its best
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
As I said, the City Management is doing its best
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
As I said, the City Management is doing its best
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Response team, do you copy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Response team, do you copy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Response team, do you copy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We found a lead. Return to HQ immediately.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We found a lead. Return to HQ immediately.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We found a lead. Return to HQ immediately.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? Return to HQ when you found a lead?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? Return to HQ when you found a lead?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? Return to HQ when you found a lead?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A <color=#ffd34c>message</color> was found at the scene.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A <color=#ffd34c>message</color> was found at the scene.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A <color=#ffd34c>message</color> was found at the scene.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We believe it to be the method of an international terrorist group that the Administration has been pursuing for several years.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We believe it to be the method of an international terrorist group that the Administration has been pursuing for several years.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We believe it to be the method of an international terrorist group that the Administration has been pursuing for several years.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, the Administration's Counterterrorism Investigation team will take on the case from here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, the Administration's Counterterrorism Investigation team will take on the case from here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, the Administration's Counterterrorism Investigation team will take on the case from here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, the response team is ordered to return to HQ.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, the response team is ordered to return to HQ.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, the response team is ordered to return to HQ.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hello? Yes, this is Skinner of the Canary Squad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hello? Yes, this is Skinner of the Canary Squad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hello? Yes, this is Skinner of the Canary Squad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me? Who is this again...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me? Who is this again...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me? Who is this again...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Please hold. I'll get him for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Please hold. I'll get him for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Please hold. I'll get him for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think you need to take this, Boss.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think you need to take this, Boss.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think you need to take this, Boss.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It sounds like someone very important.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It sounds like someone very important.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It sounds like someone very important.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies for calling at such a late hour, Supreme Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies for calling at such a late hour, Supreme Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies for calling at such a late hour, Supreme Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, you must be the Senior of Charade?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, you must be the Senior of Charade?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, you must be the Senior of Charade?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. This is Richard Werner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. This is Richard Werner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. This is Richard Werner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard the news. It seems that your employees were involved in some unfortunate events in the Gauntlet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard the news. It seems that your employees were involved in some unfortunate events in the Gauntlet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the news. It seems that your employees were involved in some unfortunate events in the Gauntlet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Results over rules. It is the disease that has plagued Charade for decades, in return for its rapid development.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Results over rules. It is the disease that has plagued Charade for decades, in return for its rapid development.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Results over rules. It is the disease that has plagued Charade for decades, in return for its rapid development.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I must say, it was quite unexpected of you to hire grade 3 citizens.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I must say, it was quite unexpected of you to hire grade 3 citizens.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I must say, it was quite unexpected of you to hire grade 3 citizens.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Should you have been aiming for results in the Gauntlet, your other employees would have been more than sufficient.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Should you have been aiming for results in the Gauntlet, your other employees would have been more than sufficient.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Should you have been aiming for results in the Gauntlet, your other employees would have been more than sufficient.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I assume you don't plan on taking action for the malfeasance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I assume you don't plan on taking action for the malfeasance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I assume you don't plan on taking action for the malfeasance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm afraid not. Primarily because I respect the unwritten law of the ruling class...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm afraid not. Primarily because I respect the unwritten law of the ruling class...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm afraid not. Primarily because I respect the unwritten law of the ruling class...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But moreover, I consider this League to be a good opportunity for you to prove your abilities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But moreover, I consider this League to be a good opportunity for you to prove your abilities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But moreover, I consider this League to be a good opportunity for you to prove your abilities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And why should I be proving something at all?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And why should I be proving something at all?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And why should I be proving something at all?

root.m_Talk_ENG: All these years, you have been taking care of everything in the dark. That's an undeniable fact.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All these years, you have been taking care of everything in the dark. That's an undeniable fact.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All these years, you have been taking care of everything in the dark. That's an undeniable fact.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But instead of staying in the dark, you've decided to come forward.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But instead of staying in the dark, you've decided to come forward.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But instead of staying in the dark, you've decided to come forward.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Controlling everything from behind the curtain and being a leader of the people are extremely different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Controlling everything from behind the curtain and being a leader of the people are extremely different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Controlling everything from behind the curtain and being a leader of the people are extremely different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So show us that you possess the ability to do so. Should you succeed, you will earn respect from all of us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So show us that you possess the ability to do so. Should you succeed, you will earn respect from all of us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So show us that you possess the ability to do so. Should you succeed, you will earn respect from all of us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will consider it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will consider it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will consider it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Supreme Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Supreme Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Supreme Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wish you good luck. Farewell.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wish you good luck. Farewell.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wish you good luck. Farewell.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies for keeping you waiting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies for keeping you waiting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies for keeping you waiting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't stop you if you wish to stay quiet...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't stop you if you wish to stay quiet...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't stop you if you wish to stay quiet...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But do remember that among the people you've killed, there are also my men from the Multinational Coalition Force.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But do remember that among the people you've killed, there are also my men from the Multinational Coalition Force.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But do remember that among the people you've killed, there are also my men from the Multinational Coalition Force.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have no intention of sending you off to prison unharmed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have no intention of sending you off to prison unharmed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have no intention of sending you off to prison unharmed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let us continue the interrogation, terrorist.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let us continue the interrogation, terrorist.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let us continue the interrogation, terrorist.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ke. Keke.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ke. Keke.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ke. Keke.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have to be kidding me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have to be kidding me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have to be kidding me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. So, she is actually Charade's secret agent...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. So, she is actually Charade's secret agent...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. So, she is actually Charade's secret agent...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And she infiltrated Six Wings years ago and has been feeding you with confidential information about us...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And she infiltrated Six Wings years ago and has been feeding you with confidential information about us...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And she infiltrated Six Wings years ago and has been feeding you with confidential information about us...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. It is an operation that has been in the works for years.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. It is an operation that has been in the works for years.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. It is an operation that has been in the works for years.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan gave us intel that Six Wings will appear at the end of the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan gave us intel that Six Wings will appear at the end of the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan gave us intel that Six Wings will appear at the end of the Qliphoth Game.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a result, we were able to capture you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a result, we were able to capture you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a result, we were able to capture you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Keke...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Keke...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Keke...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This has got to be a joke.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This has got to be a joke.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This has got to be a joke.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, mister.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, mister.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, mister.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really believe what you just told me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really believe what you just told me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really believe what you just told me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We knew from the beginning that she would be against us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We knew from the beginning that she would be against us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We knew from the beginning that she would be against us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But do you know why we didn't just get rid of her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But do you know why we didn't just get rid of her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But do you know why we didn't just get rid of her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because we thought that our interests aligned until the Qliphoth Game ended.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's because we thought that our interests aligned until the Qliphoth Game ended.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because we thought that our interests aligned until the Qliphoth Game ended.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, you still don't get it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, you still don't get it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, you still don't get it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What she did in Six Wings was collecting information.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What she did in Six Wings was collecting information.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What she did in Six Wings was collecting information.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was the perfect role for her as she was the only one of us who could show her face out in public.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was the perfect role for her as she was the only one of us who could show her face out in public.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was the perfect role for her as she was the only one of us who could show her face out in public.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At the same time, she was also in charge of concealing our members' whereabouts from being exposed to the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At the same time, she was also in charge of concealing our members' whereabouts from being exposed to the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At the same time, she was also in charge of concealing our members' whereabouts from being exposed to the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look, man.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look, man.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look, man.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said that you got information about us through that haughty woman, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said that you got information about us through that haughty woman, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said that you got information about us through that haughty woman, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But from our perspective, we knew all about the Administration's situation through her too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But from our perspective, we knew all about the Administration's situation through her too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But from our perspective, we knew all about the Administration's situation through her too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, what do you think that means?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, what do you think that means?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, what do you think that means?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Nonsense.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Nonsense.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Nonsense.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Warden, increase the output of the mind jammer to the maximum.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Warden, increase the output of the mind jammer to the maximum.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Warden, increase the output of the mind jammer to the maximum.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Could you turn that noisy thing off?! My head is ringing like crazy!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Could you turn that noisy thing off?! My head is ringing like crazy!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Could you turn that noisy thing off?! My head is ringing like crazy!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're trying to tear us apart, you'd better stop, terrorist.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're trying to tear us apart, you'd better stop, terrorist.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're trying to tear us apart, you'd better stop, terrorist.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We all know that your ability is brainwashing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We all know that your ability is brainwashing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We all know that your ability is brainwashing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I already told you, I don't! When will you get that through your thick skull?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I already told you, I don't! When will you get that through your thick skull?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I already told you, I don't! When will you get that through your thick skull?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fine! Whatever! But let me ask you one last question!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fine! Whatever! But let me ask you one last question!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fine! Whatever! But let me ask you one last question!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The location where that woman and I met after the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The location where that woman and I met after the Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The location where that woman and I met after the Qliphoth Game.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anything is fine. Did she ever tell you about what that place is?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anything is fine. Did she ever tell you about what that place is?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anything is fine. Did she ever tell you about what that place is?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Place...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Place...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Place...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I must ask.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I must ask.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I must ask.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Six Wings is a terrorist organization that the Administration has been after for years.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Six Wings is a terrorist organization that the Administration has been after for years.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Six Wings is a terrorist organization that the Administration has been after for years.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But how were you able to lure a member to a remote place this easily?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But how were you able to lure a member to a remote place this easily?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But how were you able to lure a member to a remote place this easily?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What was the information that even Six Wings wanted so badly?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What was the information that even Six Wings wanted so badly?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What was the information that even Six Wings wanted so badly?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...It seems you've forgotten, Richard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...It seems you've forgotten, Richard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...It seems you've forgotten, Richard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our deal was that I provide intelligence on Six Wings, and you cover up my activities behind the scenes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our deal was that I provide intelligence on Six Wings, and you cover up my activities behind the scenes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our deal was that I provide intelligence on Six Wings, and you cover up my activities behind the scenes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever secrets we have, didn't we agree not to ask each other about them?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever secrets we have, didn't we agree not to ask each other about them?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever secrets we have, didn't we agree not to ask each other about them?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Forget it. It's obvious she didn't tell you a thing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Forget it. It's obvious she didn't tell you a thing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Forget it. It's obvious she didn't tell you a thing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because it's also something she hid from us until the end too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because it's also something she hid from us until the end too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because it's also something she hid from us until the end too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, you're so slow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, you're so slow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, you're so slow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll tell you one last time, so listen up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll tell you one last time, so listen up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll tell you one last time, so listen up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are all being toyed with by her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are all being toyed with by her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are all being toyed with by her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You idiots.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You idiots.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You idiots.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mr. Richard. Chamber City Management is on the other line.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mr. Richard. Chamber City Management is on the other line.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mr. Richard. Chamber City Management is on the other line.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Chamber? What is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Chamber? What is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Chamber? What is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're not certain, but it seems like a member of Six Wings' activities have been sighted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're not certain, but it seems like a member of Six Wings' activities have been sighted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're not certain, but it seems like a member of Six Wings' activities have been sighted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A cryptic message was left behind at the scene.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A cryptic message was left behind at the scene.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A cryptic message was left behind at the scene.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did you say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did you say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did you say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How unusual that you contact me first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How unusual that you contact me first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How unusual that you contact me first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, what is so urgent you had to call at this late hour, doctor?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, what is so urgent you had to call at this late hour, doctor?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, what is so urgent you had to call at this late hour, doctor?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a while.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a while.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a while.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I need a testbed for a test subject.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I need a testbed for a test subject.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I need a testbed for a test subject.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A testbed...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A testbed...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A testbed...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Does that mean that the Northern Union's test of weaponizing C.O.s was a success...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Does that mean that the Northern Union's test of weaponizing C.O.s was a success...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Does that mean that the Northern Union's test of weaponizing C.O.s was a success...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although it still needs verification, I thought you might be interested.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although it still needs verification, I thought you might be interested.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although it still needs verification, I thought you might be interested.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since you are the one who secretly secured the fallen Jehuty's laboratories.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since you are the one who secretly secured the fallen Jehuty's laboratories.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since you are the one who secretly secured the fallen Jehuty's laboratories.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let me see the product first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let me see the product first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let me see the product first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He's called Harvester. He is a C.O. that understands human language and can learn.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He's called Harvester. He is a C.O. that understands human language and can learn.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He's called Harvester. He is a C.O. that understands human language and can learn.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Harvester...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Harvester...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Harvester...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A C.O. that can communicate with humans? How is that even possible?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A C.O. that can communicate with humans? How is that even possible?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A C.O. that can communicate with humans? How is that even possible?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The rest is confidential, so I can't go into detail.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The rest is confidential, so I can't go into detail.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The rest is confidential, so I can't go into detail.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our goal is to secure empirical data in a variety of situations.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our goal is to secure empirical data in a variety of situations.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our goal is to secure empirical data in a variety of situations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, the place we are in is extremely closed off.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, the place we are in is extremely closed off.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, the place we are in is extremely closed off.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, you are saying that you need data outside of the lab.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, you are saying that you need data outside of the lab.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, you are saying that you need data outside of the lab.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I decline, are you going to hand over the product to another company?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I decline, are you going to hand over the product to another company?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I decline, are you going to hand over the product to another company?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Securing data is more important than money for us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Securing data is more important than money for us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Securing data is more important than money for us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Give me some time to think about it, doctor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Give me some time to think about it, doctor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Give me some time to think about it, doctor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if so, handling a C.O. is too risky.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if so, handling a C.O. is too risky.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if so, handling a C.O. is too risky.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At least...
root.m_Talk_DEU: At least...
root.m_Talk_FRA: At least...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, you at least have some safety measures procured, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, you at least have some safety measures procured, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, you at least have some safety measures procured, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.
